title: bridge-jmap query_state tracking is dead code; since_state is silently discarded
description: bridge-jmap/src/bridge.rs: query_state is stored and passed as since_state to email_query on every poll. jmap.rs line 210 discards it immediately with 'let _ = since_state'. The tracking is completely ineffectual. Either implement Email/queryChanges or remove the dead state.
